ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., decision-making task, attention task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this design belongs to */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "design_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the design */,
  "design_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the design */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the design was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_designs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_path" TEXT /* Path to the stimulus file if it's digital */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this response belongs to */,
  "response_name" TEXT /* Name of the response */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., button press, verbal) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was recorded */,
  "response_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this participant belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., given, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this outcome belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant this outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the experiment */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  "outcome_score" REAL /* Quantitative score for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_outcomes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this reaction time belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant this reaction time belongs to */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition under which the reaction time was recorded */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID if the experiment is conducted over multiple sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brain_activity" (
  "brain_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain activity signal */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this brain activity signal belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant this brain activity signal belongs to */,
  "brain_signal" REAL /* Brain activity signal */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the brain activity was recorded */,
  "recording_time" TEXT /* Time when the brain activity was recorded */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for recording brain activity */,
  "brain_region" TEXT /* Specific brain region where the activity was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brain_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brain_activity_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
